tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Aint That A Lot Of Love

content:
[Intro]
Hit it
[tab][ch]Bb7[/ch]   [ch]A7[/ch]
           This ain't no disco[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb7[/ch]   [ch]A7[/ch]
           It ain't no country club either[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb7[/ch]   [ch]A7[/ch]
           This is L.A.[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]
"All I wanna do is have a little fun before I die"[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C7[/ch]                       [ch]D7[/ch]
says the man next to me out of nowhere[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]
 It's apropos of nothing, he says his name is William[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C7[/ch]                          [ch]D7[/ch]
but I'm sure he's Bill or Billy, or Mac or Buddy[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E7[/ch]
and he's plain ugly to me, and I wonder if he's ever[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C7[/ch]                      [ch]D7[/ch]
had a day of fun in his whole life[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]
   We are drinking beer at noon on a Tuesday[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C7[/ch]                     [ch]D7[/ch]
in a bar that faces a giant car wash[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]
   The good people of the world are washing their cars on their lunch break,[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]                         [ch]D7[/ch]                             [ch]Bb7[/ch]
   hosing and scrubbing as best they can in skirts and suits[/tab]

[Pre-chorus]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]                                     [ch]Bb7[/ch]
    They drive their shiny Datsuns and Buicks[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]                                           [ch]Bb7[/ch]
    back to the phone company and the record store too[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]
    But they're nothing like Billy and me,[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]E7[/ch]
Cause all I wanna do is have some fun,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C7[/ch]                  [ch]D7[/ch]
I got a feeling I'm not the only one[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E7[/ch]
All I wanna do is have some fun,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C7[/ch]                  [ch]D7[/ch]
I got a feeling I'm not the only one[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E7[/ch]
All I wanna do is have some fun,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C7[/ch]                [ch]B7[/ch]                 [ch]E7[/ch]        [ch]C7[/ch]    [ch]D7[/ch]
until the sun comes up over Santa Monica Boulevard[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]
   I like a good beer buzz early in the morning[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C7[/ch]                                      [ch]D7[/ch]
and Billy likes to peel the labels from his bottles of Bud[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]
   He shreds them on the bar, then he lights every match in an oversized[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]                    [ch]D7[/ch]             [ch]E7[/ch]
pack, letting each one burn, down to his[/tab]
[tab]                                                [ch]C7[/ch]
thick fingers before blowing and cursing them out[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]D7[/ch]
And he's watching the bottles of Bud as they spin on the floor[/tab]

[Pre-chorus]
[tab][ch]Bb7[/ch] [ch]A7[/ch]
        And a happy couple enters the bar,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb7[/ch]   [ch]A7[/ch]
          dangerously close to one another[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb7[/ch]   [ch]A7[/ch]
          The bartender looks up from his want ads,[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]E7[/ch]
But all I wanna do is have some fun,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C7[/ch]                  [ch]D7[/ch]
I got a feeling I'm not the only one[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E7[/ch]
All I wanna do is have some fun,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C7[/ch]                  [ch]D7[/ch]
I got a feeling I'm not the only one[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E7[/ch]
All I wanna do is have some fun,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C7[/ch]                [ch]B7[/ch]                 [ch]E7[/ch]
until the sun comes up over Santa Monica Boulevard[/tab]

[Interlude]
|([ch]E7[/ch])   | [ch]E7[/ch]    | [ch]C7[/ch]    | [ch]D7[/ch]    |
| [ch]E7[/ch]    | [ch]E7[/ch]    | [ch]C7[/ch]    | [ch]D7[/ch]

[Pre-chorus]
[tab][ch]Bb7[/ch] [ch]A7[/ch]
        Otherwise the bar is ours[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb7[/ch]   [ch]A7[/ch]                                          [ch]Bb7[/ch]
          The day and the night and the car wash too[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]                                                   [ch]Bb7[/ch]
    The matches and the Buds and the clean and dirty cars[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]
    The sun and the moon[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]E7[/ch]
But all I wanna do is have some fun,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C7[/ch]                  [ch]D7[/ch]
I got a feeling I'm not the only one[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E7[/ch]
All I wanna do is have some fun,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C7[/ch]                  [ch]D7[/ch]
I got a feeling I'm not the only one,[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]E7[/ch]
All I wanna do is have some fun,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C7[/ch]                    [ch]D7[/ch]
I got a feeling the party has just begun[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E7[/ch]
All I wanna do is have some fun,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C7[/ch]                      [ch]D7[/ch]
I won't tell ya that you're the only one[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E7[/ch]
All I wanna do is have some fun,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C7[/ch]                [ch]D7[/ch]                 [ch]E7[/ch]
until the sun comes up over Santa Monica Boulevard[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C7[/ch]                [ch]B7[/ch]                 [ch]E7[/ch]
Until the sun comes up over Santa Monica Boulevard[/tab]

[Outro]
